name: StatusPill
description: A daemon-status capsule. Dot colour is load-bearing: green=genuine liveness only, amber=asleep (first-class state), ember=error.

pulse.description: Animate the dot — use ONLY when the state is truly live.

rules: Use kind=live + pulse only for genuine real-time liveness.
kind=idle (amber) means asleep — a normal state, not a failure.
Keep the label to one word.
